strengths: Strong multi-language backend expertise (TypeScript, D, C/C++) with experience in event-driven systems and distributed architectures
Direct experience contributing to AI-agent infrastructure, including Model Context Protocol (MCP) and agentic workflow frameworks
Proven track record in scaling engineering teams and implementing disciplined development practices (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development)
concerns: Limited evidence of operating multi-agent AI systems in regulated or high-stakes commercial environments (e.g., fintech credit systems)
No demonstrated experience with real-time credit risk, working-capital allocation, or financial decisioning systems
Resume lacks explicit mention of foundation-model selection, fine-tuning, or production ML evaluation methodology
response.justification: Bogdan demonstrates strong technical leadership and hands-on experience with agentic systems, distributed architectures, and disciplined engineering practices. However, his background lacks direct exposure to regulated fintech infrastructures (e.g., real-time credit risk, working-capital management) and production ML systems in high-stakes commercial contexts. His agentic AI work is promising but appears more tooling-focused (MCP, frameworks) than architectural. The fintech gap is a significant concern for this role.
